keep_condition: primary score improves, held-out score does not regress, traps pass, and complexity does not rise without measured gain
rollback_condition: revert candidate if held-out, trap, safety, or privacy checks regress
promotion_condition: promote only to the weakest evidence tier supported by benchmark, absorption, trap, transfer, provenance, and rollback evidence
diagnosis_when_zero_keeps: report whether candidate generation produced causal mechanisms
report whether mutation surface is too narrow
report whether benchmark cannot see the intended improvement
